positive: Intricate, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and mystical celestial constellations. The composition is highly detailed, perfectly centered, and suitable for a repeating apparel print. Use clean, bold vector lines, geometric patterns, and strong illustrative silhouettes. Color palette should utilize high-contrast jewel tones: deep indigo, electric cyan, emerald green, and accents of luminous gold. The lighting must be dramatic, with a centralized, ethereal glow emanating from the core motif, creating a sense of depth and mystery. Style must evoke high-quality screen printing or sophisticated engraving art, emphasizing crisp edges and defined forms.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noise, watermarks, signatures, text, writing, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, mutation, grain, realism
